app.name: Linear
app.description: Connect Linear's GraphQL API for issues, projects, teams, cycles, and roadmap data.

files.content:
id: linear
name: Linear
version: 1.0.0
description: Access Linear issues, projects, teams, cycles, and roadmap data through the Linear GraphQL API.
auth:
  required: true
  methods:
    - id: linear-api-key
      type: header
      label: Personal API key
      header: Authorization
      default: true
icon:
  svg: assets/icon.svg
  background:
    light: "#F5F6FF"
    dark: "#11131F"
endpoints:
  linear_graphql:
    kind: graphql
    url: https://api.linear.app/graphql
    description: Linear GraphQL API.
skills:
  - skills/issues/SKILL.md
  - skills/projects/SKILL.md
